notes: Ecologically genuine dark-age NW-European biomes. Placement is climate-driven (Whittaker axes: temperature x moisture from terrain-diffusion) plus terrain rules (elevation, slope, water distance, drainage). Every biome lists ground + plants + trees that genuinely co-occur in nature. Prompts are the generation manifest for the tiling-material pipeline.

placementAxes.moisture: climate channel 2 (annual precip), normalized 0 dry .. 1 wet

prompts.granite-fell: weathered grey granite bedrock seen from directly above, patches of black and chartreuse map lichen, thin gravel, no vegetation, overcast northern light, photorealistic ground texture, top-down orthographic, seamless natural rock
prompts.lichen-scree: loose angular granite scree from directly above, frost-shattered stones fist to boulder sized, crustose lichen spots, sparse cushion moss between stones, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.heather-mat: dense flowering heather moorland from directly above, purple calluna and green shoots, patches of dark peaty soil, scattered small granite stones, sprigs of dry grass, photorealistic top-down ground texture, overcast light
prompts.peat-hag: eroded black peat surface from directly above, exposed dark organic soil, dry heather stems, tufts of moor grass at edges, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.sphagnum-carpet: waterlogged sphagnum moss bog from directly above, red green and ochre moss mounds, white cotton grass heads, small dark water-filled hollows, photorealistic top-down ground texture
prompts.bog-pool-margin: black peaty bog pool margin from directly above, dark tannin water, sedge tufts, sphagnum edge, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.leaf-litter-loam: temperate oak woodland floor from directly above, brown oak and ash leaf litter, dark loam showing through, acorns and twigs, patches of green moss, a fern frond, photorealistic top-down ground texture, dappled shade
prompts.mossy-woodland-floor: deep green moss carpet over woodland floor from directly above, moss-covered stones and a rotting log fragment, leaf litter at edges, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.needle-litter: scots pine forest floor from directly above, rust-brown pine needle litter, fallen cones, patches of pale sandy podzol soil, sparse grass, photorealistic top-down ground texture
prompts.bilberry-understory: bilberry shrub layer from directly above, small dark-green oval leaves, purple berries, needle litter and moss between, one red fly agaric mushroom, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.meadow-sward: species-rich hay meadow from directly above, mixed green grasses with yarrow white heads, purple knapweed, ox-eye daisies, buttercups, photorealistic top-down ground texture, summer light
prompts.grazed-turf: close-grazed pasture turf from directly above, short mixed grass, small bare-earth patches, a few daisy rosettes, scattered sheep-cropped thistle, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.silt-bank: muddy river bank from directly above, wet brown silt with ripple marks, flattened reeds, willow leaves, wader footprints, photorealistic top-down ground texture
prompts.gravel-bar: river gravel bar from directly above, water-rounded pebbles mixed sizes, wet sheen on lower stones, sparse pioneer plants, photorealistic top-down ground texture

prompts.shingle: storm beach shingle from directly above, grey and rust water-rounded cobbles, dried bladderwrack seaweed strands, a white shell fragment, photorealistic top-down ground texture
prompts.dune-grass-sand: coastal dune from directly above, pale wind-rippled sand, tufts of marram grass, sea thrift cushion with pink flowers, photorealistic top-down ground texture

cliffMaterials.prompt: sheer weathered granite cliff face seen straight on, horizontal bedding fractures, grey stone with rust staining and black lichen streaks, small ledges with tufts of grass, photorealistic rock texture, even overcast light, no sky no horizon
